nasb.text: Then I took the deeds of purchase, both the sealed copy containing the terms and conditions and the open copy;

esv.text: Then I took the sealed deed of purchase, containing the terms and conditions and the open copy.

cnv.text: 然後我取了買賣契約，一份是封好的，一份是沒有加封的，上面都有各種細則和條件。

ccb.text: 地契上列明了详细条款，一份加了封印，一份没有加。
